G0.label:
α : Type u_1
head✝ b : α
l : List α
x✝ : head✝ :: b :: l ≠ []
ih : ∀ (h : b :: l ≠ []), (b :: l).getLast? = some ((b :: l).last h)
⊢ (head✝ :: b :: l).getLast? = some ((head✝ :: b :: l).last x✝)

G1.label:
α : Type u_1
head b : α
l : List α
x : head :: b :: l ≠ []
ih : ∀ (h : b :: l ≠ []), (b :: l).getLast? = some ((b :: l).last h)
⊢ (head :: b :: l).getLast? = some ((head :: b :: l).last x)
